title: melica capillaris
intro: Melica capillaris, also known as false melic grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Melica capillaris can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
